basic_details.job_title: District AYUSH Medical Office West Singhbhum Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 25 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District AYUSH Medical Office West Singhbhum
basic_details.short_information: District AYUSH Medical Office West Singhbhum Yoga Instructor Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 02/2026 (Ayush). A total of 25 vacancies have been announced through the District AYUSH Medical Office West Singhbhum Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Yoga from any recognized university/institution or Certified Yoga Instructor under Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies announced for the Yoga Instructor position by the District AYUSH Medical Office West Singhbhum.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report directly at the venue on the specified dates with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Instructor role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Yoga Instructor post is Rs. 250/- per day.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Yoga from a recognized university/institution or be a Certified Yoga Instructor under Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Yoga Instructor position?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q7. When and where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted on 22-05-2026 for certain blocks and on 23-05-2026 for other blocks in Chaibasa, Jharkhand. Specific venues will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, etc.), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Yoga Instructor post is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and more details?
faq.answer: The official notification and other relevant links will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is crucial to download and read the official PDF.
